summary: The case is deferred because the decision object combines mechanistic support with high novelty, QC limits, and incomplete metadata.

steps.title: Sample and target context
steps.text: The case evaluates an E. coli sample against tetracycline using persisted job evidence.

steps.title: Phenotype prediction
steps.text: The persisted phenotype prediction reports a resistant signal for the target drug.

steps.title: Mechanistic evidence
steps.text: AMRFinderPlus evidence reports a supported tetracycline-relevant mechanism.

steps.title: Mechanism to drug interpretation
steps.text: The supported mechanism is treated as concordant evidence for the target drug context.

steps.title: Novelty and lineage shift
steps.text: The novelty layer flags elevated lineage shift, so the case needs analyst review before action.

steps.title: QC and metadata limitations
steps.text: Assembly QC and metadata completeness limit confidence in immediate operational action.

steps.title: Actionability policy interpretation
steps.text: The actionability score does not meet the configured policy threshold for immediate action.

steps.title: Final triage and next step
steps.text: The final triage is defer to lab, with confirmation or additional evidence required before action.

caveats.title: Novelty evidence needs review
caveats.detail: The novelty assessment requires analyst interpretation before operational action.

caveats.title: QC warning present
caveats.detail: The persisted decision object reports QC or metadata limitations.
